from typing import Union, Optional
from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class SuccessResult:
    data: dict
    status_code: int = 200


@dataclass
class ErrorResult:
    message: str
    status_code: int = 500


@dataclass
class RedirectResult:
    url: str
    status_code: int = 302


def process_request(request) -> Union[SuccessResult, ErrorResult, RedirectResult]:
    if request.is_json:
        return SuccessResult(data={"status": "ok"})
    elif request.is_error:
        return ErrorResult(message="Internal error")
    else:
        return RedirectResult(url="https://example.com")


def fetch_resource(resource_id: str) -> Optional[dict]:
    resource = db.get(resource_id)
    if resource is None:
        return None
    return resource.to_dict()
